title: DSV India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: DSV India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
DSV India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DSV India:
DSV India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DSV India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
